faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about patrol robots

q1.question: How long does the robot operate on a single charge?
q1.answer: The robot can operate continuously for 8-10 hours on a full battery. When battery drops below 20%, the robot automatically returns to charging station and continues patrol after fully charged.

q2.question: Can the robot operate in bad weather conditions?
q2.answer: Yes, the robot is designed with IP65 water resistance, capable of operating in light rain and humid environments. However, it's not recommended for use in heavy storms.

q3.question: How long does it take to install and deploy the system?
q3.answer: Installation typically takes 2-3 days including site survey, hardware installation, software configuration and operation training. For large systems, it may take 1-2 weeks.

q4.question: Is video data encrypted and secure?
q4.answer: All video data is encrypted with AES-256 during transmission and storage. We comply with international security standards and GDPR to protect privacy.

q5.question: Can the robot avoid obstacles and move safely?
q5.answer: The robot is equipped with multiple ultrasonic sensors, 360-degree camera and SLAM algorithm to detect and avoid obstacles. The system ensures safe movement without collisions.

q6.question: Can I control the robot remotely?
q6.answer: Yes, you can control the robot directly via mobile app or web interface. You can view real-time camera, manual navigation and configure patrol routes.

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Don't see your question? Call our hotline at 0822 608 286.

items.q: Does the robot work in the dark?
items.a: Yes. K-Patrol V10 ships with an IR camera and light-independent navigation sensors — it works down to 0 lux.

items.q: Is person detection accurate? Does it risk my privacy?
items.a: YOLOv8n runs on-device at >95% accuracy. Images are processed on the Raspberry Pi and only sent to the owner's phone when an anomaly is detected — nothing is streamed to the cloud.

items.q: Does the robot need WiFi to operate?
items.a: The robot patrols its planned route autonomously. WiFi is only needed for alerts & remote control — if the network drops, the robot keeps running.

items.q: How long does the battery last? Do I need to charge it manually?
items.a: The 12V 10Ah battery lasts ~8 hours of continuous operation. The robot auto-returns to the dock when battery drops below 20% — no manual steps.

items.q: Can I install it myself or do I need a technician?
items.a: Starter/Pro: self-install in 15 minutes via the app. Enterprise: our team handles installation & training for free.
12–24 months warranty depending on plan. On-site repair within Hanoi & HCMC. Enterprise plans include a 4-hour SLA response.
